And I'll ask you guys probably a ton as well.
Cool.
And use a lot of looms too, if there's like additional context and just throw it in the project strategy sprint.
can use that for now.
Later on, we can start using the individual strategy sprints, individual internal channels.
But for now, let's just use one channel just to start a learning loop.
We know where to go and have thoughts, ideas, things you're finding, like throw them over or whenever like you create a doc or a page that looks really good.
And you're like, hey, just created this.
Still need some.
Or feel free to check it out.
That way, like, because Notion is just, you know, I don't get notifications when a page is created.
So, like, I don't know when to go look to see if there's something new.
And so we can just, like, proactively over-communicate for now.
Okay.
Perfect.
Awesome.
Great.
All right.
I'm super excited.
We'll talk soon.
Thanks.
Bye.
Bye, everybody.

default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Kick off the strategy sprint initiative and align the team on objectives, roles, and next steps.](https://fathom.video/share/DArh1HwSyuydDVxoDxBiLyp9CzvsxDs2?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Strategy sprint aims to improve onboarding of new accounts, set clear expectations, and reduce churn risk](https://fathom.video/share/DArh1HwSyuydDVxoDxBiLyp9CzvsxDs2?tab=summary&timestamp=6.0)
  - [Elite team assembled to develop and refine the strategy sprint process before scaling](https://fathom.video/share/DArh1HwSyuydDVxoDxBiLyp9CzvsxDs2?tab=summary&timestamp=70.0)
  - [Focus on rapid research, artifact creation, and workflow development for Augment Code (first client)](https://fathom.video/share/DArh1HwSyuydDVxoDxBiLyp9CzvsxDs2?tab=summary&timestamp=77.0)
  - [Team to collaborate closely, over-communicate, and iterate quickly given the time-sensitive nature](https://fathom.video/share/DArh1HwSyuydDVxoDxBiLyp9CzvsxDs2?tab=summary&timestamp=1196.0)

## Topics

### Strategy Sprint Overview

  - [Address issues with new account onboarding and high churn rates in first 8 weeks](https://fathom.video/share/DArh1HwSyuydDVxoDxBiLyp9CzvsxDs2?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)
  - [Create elite pod to conduct compressed, intensive strategy sprints](https://fathom.video/share/DArh1HwSyuydDVxoDxBiLyp9CzvsxDs2?tab=summary&timestamp=402.0)
  - [Goals: Filter clients, set clear expectations, create robust strategies](https://fathom.video/share/DArh1HwSyuydDVxoDxBiLyp9CzvsxDs2?tab=summary&timestamp=441.0)
  - [Eventual compression to 4-week sprints with potential for platform integration](https://fathom.video/share/DArh1HwSyuydDVxoDxBiLyp9CzvsxDs2?tab=summary&timestamp=516.0)

### Team Roles and Responsibilities

  - [George: Lead discovery, conduct client interviews, gather in-depth input](https://fathom.video/share/DArh1HwSyuydDVxoDxBiLyp9CzvsxDs2?tab=summary&timestamp=94.0)
  - [Marisol: Focus on deeper research, competitive analysis, brand perception](https://fathom.video/share/DArh1HwSyuydDVxoDxBiLyp9CzvsxDs2?tab=summary&timestamp=758.0)
  - [Aida: Review artifacts, create calibrations, shape content strategy](https://fathom.video/share/DArh1HwSyuydDVxoDxBiLyp9CzvsxDs2?tab=summary&timestamp=1108.0)
  - [Marcel: Drive overall process, provide guidance and context](https://fathom.video/share/DArh1HwSyuydDVxoDxBiLyp9CzvsxDs2?tab=summary&timestamp=793.0)

### Augment Code Client Context

  - [Coding agent competing with Winsurf and Cursor](https://fathom.video/share/DArh1HwSyuydDVxoDxBiLyp9CzvsxDs2?tab=summary&timestamp=900.0)
  - [Spending $300-400k/month on paid acquisition](https://fathom.video/share/DArh1HwSyuydDVxoDxBiLyp9CzvsxDs2?tab=summary&timestamp=1008.0)
  - [High activation (60%) and monetization rates](https://fathom.video/share/DArh1HwSyuydDVxoDxBiLyp9CzvsxDs2?tab=summary&timestamp=1080.0)
  - [Seeking more scalable growth methods beyond paid advertising](https://fathom.video/share/DArh1HwSyuydDVxoDxBiLyp9CzvsxDs2?tab=summary&timestamp=1071.0)

### Research and Artifact Development

  - [Create comprehensive documentation in Notion (e.g., feature matrix, writing styles, personas)](https://fathom.video/share/DArh1HwSyuydDVxoDxBiLyp9CzvsxDs2?tab=summary&timestamp=1191.0)
  - [Develop inspiration library of successful developer content and engineering blogs](https://fathom.video/share/DArh1HwSyuydDVxoDxBiLyp9CzvsxDs2?tab=summary&timestamp=1522.0)
  - [Focus on understanding "cursor rules" and equivalent "guidelines" for Augment Code](https://fathom.video/share/DArh1HwSyuydDVxoDxBiLyp9CzvsxDs2?tab=summary&timestamp=1634.0)
  - [Build extensive library of coding ecosystem resources (e.g., MCP servers, frameworks, libraries)](https://fathom.video/share/DArh1HwSyuydDVxoDxBiLyp9CzvsxDs2?tab=summary&timestamp=1860.0)

### Vision for Deliverables

  - [Develop next-gen StackShare-like platform for AI coding agents](https://fathom.video/share/DArh1HwSyuydDVxoDxBiLyp9CzvsxDs2?tab=summary&timestamp=1996.0)
  - [Create curated, enriched database of dev ecosystem stack](https://fathom.video/share/DArh1HwSyuydDVxoDxBiLyp9CzvsxDs2?tab=summary&timestamp=2030.0)
  - [Generate valuable SEO surface area through comprehensive resource listings](https://fathom.video/share/DArh1HwSyuydDVxoDxBiLyp9CzvsxDs2?tab=summary&timestamp=1763.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Begin intensive research phase, focusing on Augment Code's space and competitors](https://fathom.video/share/DArh1HwSyuydDVxoDxBiLyp9CzvsxDs2?tab=summary&timestamp=1808.0)
  - [Create and populate Notion pages with findings, inspirations, and artifact drafts](https://fathom.video/share/DArh1HwSyuydDVxoDxBiLyp9CzvsxDs2?tab=summary&timestamp=2268.0)
  - [Collaborate closely, using Loom for additional context and Strategy Sprint project channel for updates](https://fathom.video/share/DArh1HwSyuydDVxoDxBiLyp9CzvsxDs2?tab=summary&timestamp=2257.0)
  - [Prepare for Augment Code kickoff call later today](https://fathom.video/share/DArh1HwSyuydDVxoDxBiLyp9CzvsxDs2?tab=summary&timestamp=2095.0)
  - [Aim for rapid execution and delivery given the time-sensitive nature of the client's needs](https://fathom.video/share/DArh1HwSyuydDVxoDxBiLyp9CzvsxDs2?tab=summary&timestamp=2196.0)

action_items.description: Lead discovery process post-kickoff call; determine questions to ask, people to interview at client; gather in-depth input
Continue deeper research on augment code, competitors, IDE libraries; create docs in strategy sprint projects area
Create page with inspiration/examples of good developer content; analyze why it resonates, what to do/not do to earn developers' respect
Create page listing sites found during research (e.g. MCP Marketplace, GitHub repos) as inspiration for AI agent ecosystem
